ddls:
CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., Req, Hit Ratio) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., per wave, Pct) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric value */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric the value belongs to */,
  "mean" REAL /* Mean value of the metric */,
  "min" REAL /* Minimum value of the metric */,
  "max" REAL /* Maximum value of the metric */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the metric values */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size used to calculate the mean, min, and max values */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the value was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_tags_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric the threshold belongs to */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Value of the threshold */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Operator for the threshold (e.g., lt, gt, eq) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the threshold was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the threshold was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the threshold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thresholds_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* ID of the threshold that triggered the alert */,
  "triggered_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the resolution of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_threshold_id FOREIGN KEY ("threshold_id") REFERENCES thresholds ("threshold_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the role belongs to */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical value */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric the value belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric at the given timestamp */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the value was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the historical value was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_history_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)
